title: OrchestratorOutput
description: Structured output schema for the meta-reasoning orchestrator's final consolidated result.

task_type.description: Classification of the task (e.g. 'design decision', 'diagnosis', 'policy analysis', 'strategic planning')

stakes.description: Estimated stakes of getting the answer wrong

actors_and_stakeholders.description: Identified actors, their roles, intents, and constraints

wildcard_families.description: Families dispatched as wildcards for unexpected insights

selection_rationale.description: Why each family was selected or excluded

agent_results.description: Collected outputs from all dispatched specialist agents

executive_summary.description: Concise integrated answer to the user's task — should state the terminal claim plainly

argumentative_chain_main.description: The assembled cross-agent chain from Phase 5.5a — the structural backbone of synthesis

step.description: Step number in the cross-agent chain

contributing_family.description: Which reasoning family contributed this step

premise.description: Opening claim for this step (must be conclusion of step N-1)

reasoning_step_type.description: deductive | inductive | abductive | modal | analogical | counterexample | proportionality | defeasible | conceptual

conclusion.description: What follows from the premise via this step

key_assumption.description: What must be true for this step to hold

cross_family_stitch.description: True if this step stitches two different families' chains together

terminal_claim.description: The specific, falsifiable claim this synthesis commits to — must name an actual conclusion, not a complexity statement

terminal_claim_defeat_conditions.description: Concrete circumstances under which the terminal claim would be wrong (minimum 2)

terminal_claim_refutation_status.description: Whether the claim was tested by Phase 5.6 Refutation Agent and survived, was defeated, or was not tested

integrated_findings.description: Load-bearing steps of the assembled chain, attributed to contributing families — NOT a flat merge of all agent findings

cross_family_insights.description: Insights from cross-family stitching points where two agents' conclusions reinforce each other non-obviously

conflicts_or_tensions.description: Genuine disagreements between reasoning families that should be preserved

validation_notes.description: External validity checks and real-world grounding

confidence_overall.description: Overall confidence in the synthesised answer

chain_depth_check.description: PASS if chain meets minimum length for complexity level, FAIL if quality defect, WARN if borderline

chain_integrity_check.description: PASS if every step N premise derives from step N-1 conclusion, FAIL if chain breaks found

cross_family_threading_check.description: PASS if main chain draws from 3+ distinct families

terminal_claim_check.description: PASS if terminal_claim is specific and falsifiable with defeat conditions, FAIL if missing or unfalsifiable

ingestion_contract_check.description: PASS if all integrated_findings are traceable to assembled chain steps, FAIL if cataloging artifacts detected

cache_status.description: Whether the result was served from cache or freshly computed

hit.description: True if the result was served from cache

cache_key.description: The cache key (SHA-256 hash of normalised task)

cached_at.description: When the cached result was originally computed (ISO 8601)

cache_age_seconds.description: How old the cache entry is in seconds

refinement_log.description: Log of iterative refinement passes beyond the initial dispatch

total_passes.description: Total number of dispatch passes (1 = no refinement)

cost_summary.description: Execution cost estimates for this invocation

total_agents_dispatched.description: Total agent dispatches including refinement passes

total_response_chars.description: Approximate total characters in all agent responses

cache_savings.description: Description of cache savings if applicable
